title: Missing support for IEEE 1800-2023 parameterized typedef (Section 6.20.1)

features.name: parameterized typedef declaration with type parameter
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration with a parameter port list (#) after the typedef name, using a type parameter

features.name: parameterized typedef instantiation with size argument
features.description: Code should include an instantiation of a parameterized typedef where the parameter is a positive integer literal specifying the width

features.name: parameterized typedef with logic vector type
features.description: Code should include a typedef that defines a parameterized logic vector type using a type parameter in the dimension
